reviews.author: Pete R.
reviews.text: Went in for an estimate and was told it would be two weeks before they could even start. Not great customer service. Ended up going elsewhere.

reviews.author: Michelle L.
reviews.text: Hari and his team did an incredible job on my bumper. Fast, fair pricing, and they kept me updated the whole time. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Derek W.
reviews.text: Best body shop in Edison. Amit really knows his stuff with frame work. Will definitely come back.

reviews.author: Brian J.
reviews.text: Good work on my quarter panel. A little slow on the final pickup but the quality was there.

reviews.author: Raj M.
reviews.text: Been going to Hari's for years. They treat you like family and the work is top notch.
